title: Long-dictation ASR evaluation and streaming-route validation
created_from: Manual app smoke and DeepResearch Task 01 on long-dictation realtime ASR architecture

follow_ups.title: Timed PCM smoke for mlx-qwen3-asr session-like API
follow_ups.reason: Source probe found init_streaming/feed_audio/finish_streaming and tail refinement signals, but no timed PCM gate has loaded the model and proven partial/final/cancel behavior.

follow_ups.title: Public long-speech corpus acquisition
follow_ups.reason: The manifest records public dataset/media candidates, but the first runnable pass used existing local and synthetic material only.
